debug_info.goal:
f : ℝ → ℂ
hf : IsUnifAlmostPeriodic f
⊢ UniformContinuous f

failed_attempts:
by
  rw [Metric.uniformContinuous_iff]
  intro ε hε
  obtain ⟨l, hl⟩ := hf (by linarith : (0 : ℝ) < ε / 3)
  have hl_pos := hl.pos
  have : IsCompact (Set.Icc (-l) (2 * l)) := isCompact_Icc
  have huc := this.uniformContinuousOn_of_continuous (Continuous.continuousOn (by continuity))
  rw [Metric.uniformContinuousOn_iff] at huc
  obtain ⟨δ, hδ_pos, hδ⟩ := huc (ε / 3) (by linarith)
  use min δ l, lt_min hδ_pos hl_pos
  intro x y hxy
  obtain ⟨t, ⟨ht0, htl⟩, hxt⟩ := hl (-x)
  have hx' : x + t ∈ Set.Icc (-l) (2 * l) := by constructor <;> linarith
  have hy' : y + t ∈ Set.Icc (-l) (2 * l) := by
    have : dist x y < l := lt_of_lt_of_le hxy (min_le_right _ _)
    rw [Real.dist_eq] at this
    constructor <;> linarith [abs_lt.mp this]
  have hdist : dist (x + t) (y + t) < δ := by
    simp only [dist_add_right]
    exact lt_of_lt_of_le hxy (min_le_left _ _)
  have h1 := hδ (x + t) hx' (y + t) hy' hdist
  have hap : IsLinftyAP (ε / 3) t f := by simpa using hxt
  calc dist (f x) (f y) 
      = ‖f x - f y‖ := by rw [dist_eq_norm]
    _ = ‖(f x - f (x + t)) + (f (x + t) - f (y + t)) + (f (y + t) - f y)‖ := by ring_nf
    _ ≤ ‖f x - f (x + t)‖ + ‖f (x + t) - f (y + t)‖ + ‖f (y + t) - f y‖ := by
        apply le_trans (norm_add_le _ _)
        gcongr
        exact norm_add_le _ _
    _ = ‖f (x + t) - f x‖ + dist (f (x + t)) (f (y + t)) + ‖f (y + t) - f y‖ := by
        rw [norm_sub_comm, dist_eq_norm]
    _ ≤ ε / 3 + ε / 3 + ε / 3 := by
        gcongr
        · exact hap x
        · exact le_of_lt h1
        · have : ‖f (y + t) - f y‖ = ‖f y - f (y + t)‖ := norm_sub_comm _ _
          rw [this, ← sub_add_cancel y (-t), ← neg_neg t, ← sub_eq_add_neg]
          simp only [sub_neg_eq_add]
          exact hap y
    _ = ε := by ring
